title: Screw Your Items
description: Randomly deletes a number of items from your inventory on death
body:
Screw Your Items is a mod that deletes some amount of items from your inventory on death, the amount of items deleted is configurable.

 

I am very new to making mods so please understand that this mod may exhibit unexpected behavior or bugs, please provide comments/concern/criticism/bug reports as it will help me improve the quality of the mod greatly.

[Curseforge page for feedback](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/screw-your-items)
